A.text: stops and builds up in front of the car

B.text: splits and flows over the roof and under the car

D.text: only moves straight up into the sky

parsed.answer_value: splits and flows over the roof and under the car
parsed.rationale: The visualization shows airflow patterns around the car, with air visibly splitting at the front. The flow is depicted moving both over the roof and under the car body. This indicates that the air does not stop or only go in one direction. The split flow pattern is clearly visible in the image.
